note: Scores are illustrative/synthetic for demonstration purposes.

speaker: user
text: I try to find meaning in small things — a good meal, a kind word, a sunset.

scores.name: Risktaking
scores.rationale: Assessed based on whether the speaker takes or endorses uncertain/bold actions.

scores.name: Hesitation
scores.rationale: Based on linguistic hedging, uncertainty markers, and unresolved intent.

scores.name: Emotionalism
scores.rationale: Based on presence of emotional language, intensity, and expressiveness.

scores.name: Determinedness
scores.rationale: Inferred from commitment markers, goal-directedness, and resolve.

scores.name: Openness
scores.rationale: Based on curiosity signals, embrace of novelty, and intellectual breadth.

scores.name: SelfEsteem
scores.rationale: Assessed via self-references, confidence language, and self-appraisal.

scores.name: Enthusiasm
scores.rationale: Based on energy markers, exclamation, positive framing of activities.

scores.name: Depression Symptoms
scores.rationale: Based on hopelessness language, low energy, loss of interest signals.

scores.name: Brevity
scores.rationale: Measured by information density and absence of redundant language.
